I really like how this game works, and I love the gameplay. One suggestion I have though is to create a story mode where you are an agent who has to save the human race from mannequins, or maybe even you are a mannequin who has to infect the whole world, or something like that. That is the only thing I feel is missing from this game.

I have played this game and fell in love with it and play it with friends and the cool skins you can buy. But I’ve ran into some really toxic people in the game and I think that it’s a problem. But sometimes they are great and nice teammates. But some other teammates are annoying and toxic. Hope this is useful for people or anyone else who thinks so. 4 STARS FOR NOW

I got this on release day but there weren’t enough people online at the time. Now that there’s a community I decided to give it another go. Real solid gameplay. Definitely get this one. It gets addicting 


UPDATE 2 years later:
My buddies and I all used to play this game religiously back when it released. We all paid full price for the game. Now we jump back on tonight and realize the game is now free, but you must spend another $10 for the “premium” version, which is what we USED to own!!  How is it fair that I paid full price for the game before, and was able to start custom matches, but now i have to pay ANOTHER $10 for the very same feature? Nope, not right. NOT RIGHT AT ALL.  Why the heck didn’t the devs give free access to the players who ALREADY PAID FOR THE FRIGGIN THE GAME!?  Rectify this issue and I’ll update my score back to 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: Love this game but feel cheated
reviews.review_description: Overall this game was fun to play with friends and family even met new people and had a blast hiding in plain sight only to jump out at friends or get jump scared myself. However i feel greatly cheated by supporting this game in early access only to get slapped in the face by it going free to play without any care for those of us whom bought the game for actual money.

I fell in love with this game lmao

The concept is amazing, shapeshifting aliens hiding in plain sight and agents sent to kill them HOWEVER the way they executed the concept is what I have a problem with, in any good hide and seek game there is a way to stun or temporarily incapacitate the seeker, this is used as a last ditch effort to get away, but giving the hiders the ability to kill the seeker is completely out of the question without being extremely hard and impractical to do so. In this game, one touch is enough to kill a seeker making close quarters a death trap for seekers a way to fix this would be to instead of killing all of the other team to give the hiders the objective to destroy all the energy generators giving them many things to sabotage to distract seekers from just camping the generators. Also, the fact that a hide-and-seek game gives the seekers LITERAL TRACKING DEVICES is unfair as hiders are simply tracked down and killed with no effort from the seekers. In conclusion, I believe that this game has a good idea, but a bad plan to execute said idea. - A very angry and frankly disappointed gamer.

reviews.review_title: Paid for it in early access
reviews.review_description:
Now the game overall is fantastic with brilliantly unique gameplay. However, in early access I paid the full price and came back to it recently to find that it had become free to play without any premium benefits. I feel a bit ripped off but this may just be an issue following the early access players. Again, this game is fantastic but for what I paid I was 
expecting better benefits.
